title: Syncing Monday with a shared Outlook calendar
excerpt: We would like to connect our board to a “shared” Outlook calendar. By shared, I mean Microsoft doesn’t assign it a password. The Outlook Calendar Integration Plus app requires a password. Is there any way to make that ap…

posts.author: jhurley (Jill Hurley)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to connect our board to a “shared” Outlook calendar. By shared, I mean Microsoft doesn’t assign it a password. The Outlook Calendar Integration Plus app requires a password. Is there any way to make that app password optional?
